last_cycle.reason: Light theme shipped, mobile responsive fixes applied, WCAG AA contrast verified for all CSS vars. Deliverable + 4 screenshots in outputs/. Browser screenshot confirms live dashboard renders light theme correctly.

Audit ran (3 violations found, saved to .gstack/a11y-report.json) but fixes for the 3 critical/serious violations were NOT applied. Retry with explicit instruction: apply fixes for the 3 violations listed in .gstack/a11y-report.json (especially aria-allowed-attr critical impact), then re-run axe-core scan to verify 0 critical violations remain.
Task scope was pivoted to UI work via steering (light theme + sidebar density). Perf measurement deferred to future plan. Verify was set to off mid-cycle.

message_to_user: Cycle 1: mobile + light theme shipped and verified live. A11y audit ran (3 violations) but fixes not yet applied — retrying with explicit fix instructions. Perf skipped per scope pivot.
